shortsPlaylist.title: Codename One Shorts — Java Mobile Engineering
shortsPlaylist.description: Short, source-grounded explanations of Codename One APIs, ports, tooling, performance work, and engineering tradeoffs.

trails.title: Codename One Native Platforms & Device APIs
trails.description: A guided trail through widgets, automotive, TV, watch, background, communication, and native-interface APIs in one Java codebase.

trails.title: Build, Test & Ship Codename One Apps
trails.description: A practical trail covering project settings, certificates, reproducible builds, store delivery, code generation, debugging, tests, compliance, and modern Java workflows.

trails.title: Codename One UI, Graphics & Media
trails.description: A technical trail through visual fidelity, video generation, editors, maps, portable 3D, Metal, modern themes, density, accessibility, and iOS rendering.

trails.title: Game Development with Codename One
trails.description: Start with the Game Builder data model, then build 2D, board, and 3D games and understand the portable loop, sprites, physics, and sound underneath.

trails.title: Native Java Ports & Performance
trails.description: A deep technical trail through AOT optimization, self-contained Linux, Windows, and Mac applications, and the experimental Java 17 boundary.

trails.title: Security, Privacy & Reliability in Codename One
trails.description: A source-grounded trail through consent-first analytics, device integrity, crash delivery and symbolication, cryptography, biometrics, and AI supply-chain trust.

trails.title: Building Codename One in the Open
trails.description: How Codename One funds long-term open-source engineering and evolves the infrastructure that publishes its technical work.
